title: Apply light-blue theme, fix phone number, add washing machine images, and add block-style 3D ALL CAPS branding

requirements.text: Apply a clean light-blue visual theme (light-blue backgrounds with dark/near-black text) consistently across the entire site by updating the global theme tokens in `frontend/src/index.css` (e.g., `--background`, `--muted`, `--card`, `--primary`, `--accent`, `--border`, and related foreground tokens), ensuring all sections and components (including header/footer, cards, and muted section backgrounds like Gallery) reflect the light-blue styling.
acceptanceCriteria: The site background reads as light-blue (not warm/cream) across all sections.
Body text uses a dark/near-black color with sufficient contrast on the new light-blue backgrounds.
Cards, borders, and muted surfaces use cohesive light-blue-tinted neutrals (no remaining warm/cream surfaces).
Accent/primary colors remain readable and consistent with the light-blue theme across buttons, icons, and links.

requirements.text: Update the displayed phone number site-wide to `98431 29760` by changing `businessInfo.phone` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts`, and ensure every call action uses the updated number (e.g., Hero and Contact 'Call Now' buttons and the Contact 'Phone' link).
acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` contains `businessInfo.phone` set to `98431 29760` exactly as displayed text.
All `tel:` links across the site dial the updated number (including Hero and Contact CTAs).
No other component displays the old phone number.

requirements.text: Update the WhatsApp number site-wide so that WhatsApp links use the correct `wa.me` format for the phone number `98431 29760` by updating `businessInfo.whatsapp` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` to the E.164 digits-only format expected by `https://wa.me/<number>` (India country code included).
acceptanceCriteria: `businessInfo.whatsapp` is updated to an India E.164 digits-only value that corresponds to `98431 29760` (e.g., includes country code and no spaces).
All WhatsApp buttons/links across the site open a WhatsApp chat to the updated number.
No remaining WhatsApp link points to the previous number.

requirements.text: Add additional free-to-use stock gallery images that clearly include washing machines and visually reflect laundry/dry cleaning services, and include them in `galleryImages` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` so they render in the Gallery grid.

quotes: also include free images of washing machines which reflect the dry cleaning services also

acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 new gallery images depicting washing machines in a laundry/dry-cleaning context are added to the Gallery data (`galleryImages`).
Each new gallery item has an appropriate English `alt` text describing the image content.
The Gallery section renders the new washing machine images without layout breakage across responsive breakpoints.

requirements.text: Change the brand/business name display to ALL CAPS, bold, with a block-style 3D look by generating a block-style 3D text graphic for the brand name and updating `frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx` and `frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx` to use the new block-style 3D branding presentation (while keeping the existing tagline text present and readable).

quotes: change MJ Steam Ironing and Dry Cleaning Services to all capitals and bold with a three dimension output

acceptanceCriteria: Header branding displays the business name in ALL CAPS with a block-style 3D appearance.
Footer branding displays the business name in ALL CAPS with the same block-style 3D appearance.
The tagline text remains present and readable in both header and footer.
Branding remains responsive (does not overflow or break the header layout on mobile).

constraints: Frontend: Do not modify any files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (compose them only).
Frontend: Do not edit immutable hook files (`frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`).
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor; no additional backend services.
nonGoals: Adding new sections beyond what already exists on the single-page site.
Integrating third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
Embedding interactive maps or adding location/map features.

required: Block-style 3D text reading "MJ STEAM IRONING AND DRY CLEANING SERVICES" on a transparent background (brand-3d-block.dim_1600x400.png)
Photo of modern front-loading washing machines in a clean laundry/dry-cleaning setting (gallery-washing-machine-1.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Photo of a professional laundry/dry-cleaning workspace including washing machines and garment racks (gallery-washing-machine-2.dim_1200x800.jpg)
